title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 10–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Midnight snack! What are you making?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, he's in the bath with Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are you all warmed up now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What does that brat think he's doing!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hold still while I cut your topknot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That was scary, that it was, M'lady...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I... I can't bring myself to sleep!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Nothing strange on the horizon of

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
